title: Brand Sync — Motorsport Sponsorship Proposal

lines.speaker: Laura Mitchell
lines.text: I'd like us to sponsor a Formula 1 team next season as a brand awareness play in new markets.

lines.speaker: Priya Nair
lines.text: It's a bold idea. We don't really have anything comparable in our history to anchor it.

lines.speaker: Sarah Johnson
lines.text: Right — there's no prior motorsport or large brand-sponsorship decision we can point to for outcomes.

transcript: Laura Mitchell (00:09): I'd like us to sponsor a Formula 1 team next season as a brand awareness play in new markets. Priya Nair (00:21): It's a bold idea. We don't really have anything comparable in our history to anchor it. Sarah Johnson (00:34): Right — there's no prior motorsport or large brand-sponsorship decision we can point to for outcomes.
